title: The Battle for Syrup Village Escalates
description: On pages 22–24, the battle for Syrup Village intensifies as the Straw Hats, Usopp, and the village’s defenders confront Kuro’s pirates.
scene: The quiet village becomes a battlefield, with Usopp’s lies turning into real courage and the Straw Hats forcing Kuro’s plan to unravel.

dialogue.speaker: Kaya
dialogue.text: I have a friend in this village...

dialogue.speaker: Kaya
dialogue.text: That I don't wanna see dead!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: East, East!! I told you to go east!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: How am I supposed to know which side is east! Just say left or right!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Then turn around and go right!!

dialogue.speaker: Kaya
dialogue.text: Are you really okay with it?

dialogue.speaker: Kaya
dialogue.text: After all, it'll be your reason for dying...

dialogue.speaker: Kaya
dialogue.text: Huf... I'm sorry... you boys, keep going ahead

dialogue.speaker: Usopp
dialogue.text: What are you saying!? We are here to protect you, Kaya-san!!

dialogue.speaker: Kaya
dialogue.text: Oh no!! She looks really sick!!

dialogue.speaker: Kaya
dialogue.text: We must take her to the doctor!!

dialogue.speaker: Kaya
dialogue.text: idiot, we're running for our lives now!

dialogue.speaker: Kaya
dialogue.text: But it's too dangerous to let her go on!!

dialogue.speaker: Kaya
dialogue.text: We'll have to make a decision, USOPP? Pirate group!!

summary: This part pushes the arc from conspiracy into open battle, testing Usopp’s courage and the Straw Hats’ trust in him.
